allow: PowerShell(conda run -n aml_26 python -c "import torch; print\('PyTorch version:', torch.__version__\); print\('CUDA available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(conda run -n aml_p2 pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124 2>&1)
PowerShell(conda run -n aml_p2 pip install scikit-learn imbalanced-learn pandas matplotlib seaborn jupyter ipykernel joblib 2>&1)

PowerShell(conda run -n aml_p2 python -c "import torch; import sklearn; import imblearn; import pandas; import numpy; import matplotlib; import seaborn; import joblib; print\('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('sklearn', sklearn.__version__\); print\('imblearn', imblearn.__version__\); print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\)")
PowerShell(conda run -n aml_p2 python -c "import torch; print\('GPU:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\)\)" 2>&1)
